goal: is_local_equiv_data[M, E](c.source.intersection(s), c.target.intersection(set_preimage[E, M](c.inv_fun, s)), c.to_fun, c.inv_fun)

p.c: function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1]) { Set.new[T0](lib(set).preimage_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[E, M](c.to_local_equiv.inv_fun, s)
function[T0, T1](x0: T0 -> T1, x1: Set[T1]) { Set.new[T0](lib(set).preimage_contains[T0, T1](x0, x1)) = set_preimage[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[E, M](c.inv_fun, s)

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Set[E], Set[E], (M -> E, E -> M) -> Bool](is_local_equiv_data[M, E](c.to_local_equiv.source ∩ s), c.to_local_equiv.target.intersection, set_preimage[E, M](c.to_local_equiv.inv_fun, s))

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: T1 -> T2, x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { compose[T0, T1, T2](x0, x1, x2) = x0(x1(x2)) }[Set[E], Set[E], (M -> E, E -> M) -> Bool](is_local_equiv_data[M, E](c.source ∩ s), c.target.intersection, set_preimage[E, M](c.inv_fun, s))

function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[E -> M](is_local_equiv_data[M, E](c.to_local_equiv.source ∩ s, c.to_local_equiv.target ∩ set_preimage[E, M](c.to_local_equiv.inv_fun, s), c.to_local_equiv.to_fun), c.to_local_equiv.inv_fun)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[E -> M](is_local_equiv_data[M, E](c.source ∩ s, c.target ∩ set_preimage[E, M](c.inv_fun, s), c.to_fun), c.inv_fun)

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { LocalEquiv.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) = is_local_equiv_data[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[M, E](c.source ∩ s, c.target ∩ set_preimage[E, M](c.inv_fun, s), c.to_fun, c.inv_fun)

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { not LocalEquiv.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) or exists(k0: LocalEquiv[T0, T1]) { Option.some[LocalEquiv[T0, T1]](k0) = LocalEquiv.new[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) } }[M, E](c.source ∩ s, c.target ∩ set_preimage[E, M](c.inv_fun, s), c.to_fun, c.inv_fun)

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { lib(pair).curry[T0, T1, T2](lib(pair).uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0), x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) }[Set[E], Set[M], (E -> M, M -> E) -> Bool](is_local_equiv_data[E, M], c.to_local_equiv.target, c.to_local_equiv.source)

function[T0, T1, T2](x0: (T0, T1) -> T2, x1: T0, x2: T1) { lib(pair).curry[T0, T1, T2](lib(pair).uncurry[T0, T1, T2](x0), x1, x2) = x0(x1, x2) }[Set[E], Set[M], (E -> M, M -> E) -> Bool](is_local_equiv_data[E, M], c.target, c.source)

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { not LocalEquiv.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) or exists(k0: LocalEquiv[T0, T1]) { Option.some[LocalEquiv[T0, T1]](k0) = LocalEquiv.new[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) } }[E, M](c.target, c.source, c.inv_fun, c.to_fun)

goal: is_local_equiv_data[E, E](c1.to_local_equiv.target.intersection(set_preimage[E, M](c1.to_local_equiv.inv_fun, c2.to_local_equiv.source)), c2.to_local_equiv.target.intersection(set_preimage[E, M](c2.to_local_equiv.inv_fun, c1.to_local_equiv.source)), compose[E, M, E](c2.to_local_equiv.to_fun, c1.to_local_equiv.inv_fun), compose[E, M, E](c1.to_local_equiv.to_fun, c2.to_local_equiv.inv_fun))

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { LocalEquiv.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) = is_local_equiv_data[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) }[E, E](c1.target ∩ set_preimage[E, M](c1.inv_fun, c2.source), c2.target ∩ set_preimage[E, M](c2.inv_fun, c1.source), compose[E, M, E](c2.to_fun, c1.inv_fun), compose[E, M, E](c1.to_fun, c2.inv_fun))

function[T0, T1](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T1], x2: T0 -> T1, x3: T1 -> T0) { not LocalEquiv.constraint[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) or exists(k0: LocalEquiv[T0, T1]) { Option.some[LocalEquiv[T0, T1]](k0) = LocalEquiv.new[T0, T1](x0, x1, x2, x3) } }[E, E](c1.target ∩ set_preimage[E, M](c1.inv_fun, c2.source), c2.target ∩ set_preimage[E, M](c2.inv_fun, c1.source), compose[E, M, E](c2.to_fun, c1.inv_fun), compose[E, M, E](c1.to_fun, c2.inv_fun))
